name: ETH Session Drive Continuation v1
edge_mechanism: session-led directional control with short follow-through continuation
thesis: ETH 1h is the best-fit primary lane for testing whether a dominant session can create a short-lived continuation edge after price holds near session-led value. The edge is participation in broad follow-through, not blind breakout chasing.
invalidation_condition: Abort if session-drive continuation stays too sparse, if dominant-session moves fail to produce a second leg, or if the setup only captures one-bar bursts that mean-revert immediately.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: One session structurally dominates the 1h bar cluster, price holds near session-led value rather than fully mean reverting, and continuation engages on the follow-through leg.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Transition-heavy intraday conditions often print uneven participation where one session does the real work and the next leg extends that imbalance before mean reversion catches up.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: ETH 1h is appropriate because session-led surges are visible and liquid enough to support realistic partial exits plus a runner.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If the market is actually too choppy, session dominance will not persist long enough and continuation entries will stall.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If entries trade with acceptable density but the runner rarely pays, shorten the management structure before changing the continuation trigger.
pre_submit_reasoning.expected_outcome_pattern: Mixed hit rate with a few cleaner continuation bursts carrying expectancy.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_success: ETH plus at least one cross-lane show credible density and post-cost continuation after the session-driven move.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_failure: 0 trades, thin low-trade outputs, or repeated hold entries that fail to produce a second leg.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: low; hold and continuation are sequential
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: kept reasonable by broad dominance/hold logic instead of exact intraday windows

validation_basket.why_included: Best fit for session-led momentum with enough liquidity for realistic continuation testing.
validation_basket.continue_if: Continuation appears with credible density and positive post-cost behavior.
validation_basket.rotate_away_if: Only isolated one-bar spikes appear or density collapses.
validation_basket.expected_if_right: A small but tradable set of dominant-session holds should extend into a second leg.

validation_basket.why_included: Checks whether the mechanism survives on a cleaner major lane rather than only on ETH-specific structure.
validation_basket.continue_if: BTC shows comparable but cleaner hold-and-follow-through behavior.
validation_basket.expected_if_right: Smaller but more orderly continuation than ETH.

validation_basket.why_included: Tests whether session-drive continuation survives a slower structure without collapsing into sparse logic.
validation_basket.continue_if: 4h yields fewer but cleaner continuation clusters.
validation_basket.rotate_away_if: The mechanism only exists as intraday noise.
validation_basket.expected_if_right: Lower frequency but clearer follow-through after dominant session control.
